pages.title: Locathah
pages.text: Fish-folk. Permanent tail — part of you, not equipment. Apex aquatic; weak on land. The only race whose signature isn't equip-gated.

pages.title: In water
pages.text: $(bold)Aquatic Lungs.$(/) Infinite breath. You never drown.$(br2)$(bold)Current-Born.$(/) Swim speed +40%.$(br2)$(bold)Deep Sight.$(/) Underwater view is clear — no blur.$(br2)$(bold)Leviathan's Will.$(/) Immune to poison and nausea.

pages.title: On land
pages.text: $(bold)Dry-Out.$(/) Out of water for roughly 90 seconds you start accumulating weakness, slowness, and a mining penalty. No damage — just penalties.$(br2)Submerge to reset. Plan colonies near water.
